About

SuiFOX: More Than Just a Meme Token" SuiFOX is not just a meme token; it’s a community-driven ecosystem. Powered by the SUI, we offer fast, secure, and low-cost transactions while delivering a fun and creative experience. Our mission? To showcase the potential of blockchain technology to the world while keeping the spirit of memes alive and thriving

Roadmap

Launch and Community Building - Logo and Branding Development: Completion of the SuiFOX logo and core visuals. - Social Media Launch: Establishing a presence on Twitter, Telegram, Discord, and other platforms. - Tokenomics Design: Defining maximum supply, distribution plan, and burn mechanism. - SuiFOX Whitepaper: Sharing the project’s vision through a fun yet informative document. - Initial Marketing Campaign: Launching giveaways, meme competitions, and creating viral content.
